meaning: phrasal verb / cum tu TOEIC 700: follow up
example: The team needs to follow up before the end of the day.
exampleVi: Nhom can follow up truoc cuoi ngay.

meaning: phrasal verb / cum tu TOEIC 700: follow up the report
example: The team needs to follow up the report before the end of the day.
exampleVi: Nhom can follow up the report truoc cuoi ngay.
